description:
IB V,4: Letter fragment. In the hand of Abū Zikrī Kohen (according to Goitein's notes). Mentions Sayyidnā, al-Shaykh Maḍmūn, Ismāʿīl al-Majjānī; the kārim convoy (which travelled between Yemen and ʿAydhāb); a letter from the sender's in-law Maḥrūz in Sawākin about 3,000 loads. A complete list of the Jews who left with the kārim is Maḥrūz [b. Yaʿaqov], Zikrī b. Sar Shalom, Ibn al-Dabbāgh; al-Maḥallī; Ibn Junūn(?); Nahray; and Ibn al-Baqqāl.
On verso: contributors list (PGPID 34013).
description_he: שרידי מכתב, ספר הודו V,4, בכתב ידו של אבו זכרי כהן, מזכיר שייח' מצמון, ישמעאל אל-מג'אני וקארים השיירה לתימן
